title: Exposome research needed to avoid ‘epidemic of non-communicable diseases’, warns MEP [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The EU is making strides in incorporating the new exposome concept of exposure cocktails into law. But there is concern that the simplification drive could undo that progress
summary_public: The EU is making strides in incorporating the new exposome concept of exposure cocktails into law. But there is concern that the simplification drive could undo that progress
